attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks inside final 2km on uphill finishes and steep ramps, timing moves late enough to prevent organized chases from elite climbers.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team setup patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Steep finishing ramps and punchy uphill finales suit best; likely exposed on longer classified climbs where pure climbers can apply sustained pressure.
vulnerability: May struggle on sustained categorized climbs where pure climbers control tempo, as success came specifically on short explosive finish rather than extended climbing.
key_patterns: Attacks inside final 2km on uphill finishes to maximize surprise element.
Targets steep ramps over classified climbs for winning opportunities.
Capable of holding off stronger-credentialed riders when timing attack optimally late.
form_trajectory: unknown: single 2018 observation shows breakthrough WorldTour win capability but insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
